title: Incorrect results with partially out-of-bounds part select

features.name: downward part select with variable index exceeding upper bound
features.description: Code should include a downward part select (-:) using a variable index expression that results in a start index beyond the packed array upper bound

features.name: packed array with non-zero lower bound index
features.description: Code should include a packed array or parameter declared with a non-zero lower bound index (e.g., [5:15] instead of [10:0])

features.name: variable-based part select index computation
features.description: Code should include a part select index computed from an expression combining constant and variable values (e.g., 15 + a -: 5)
